title: Build partial fo-experience.tsx state machine (discovery through first batch)
description: Create app/fo-13/components/fo-experience.tsx: state machine covering steps 0-6 (welcome through tone) + thinking screens A-C + first batch generation. Uses ThinkingScreen component with correct messages per spec. Thinking C triggers generateAffirmationBatchFO13 with batchSize=5. After Thinking C + generation complete, advance to a placeholder step (phase 1 will be wired in iteration 02.2).
closed_reason: Built fo-experience.tsx partial state machine (steps 0-6) with ThinkingScreen transitions A-C, first batch generation, and src/fo-13/ implementation provider. Refactored to avoid setState-in-useEffect lint error.
